email_verification.heading: Check your email
email_verification.blurb: To confirm your email address, enter the verification code in the email we just sent to <1>{{userEmail}}</1>
email_verification.blurb.please_enter_co: Please enter the verification code we just sent to <1>{{userEmail}}</1>
email_verification.blurb.did_not_get_cod: Didn't get the code? <1>Resend code</1> or <2>Edit email address</2>
email_verification.error.invalid: Invalid verification code provided, please try again.
email_verification.error.code_sent_faile: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
email_verification.error.change_email_fa: Failed to change email. Please try again
email_verification.error.limit_exceeded_: Maximum number of verification code attempts has been exceeded. Please try again later.
email_verification.validation.error.empt: Failed to change email. Must input a valid email to change to.
email_verification.validation.error.inva: Failed to change email. Please enter a valid email
Failed to change email. Please use lowercase.
